messages.content: Hey everyone! 😊 Hope you’re all having a good day. Anyone up for a movie night this weekend?
That sounds fun! I’m definitely in. Any movie suggestions? 🍿
I’m down! How about something spooky or a comedy? I could bring snacks too if we want to make it a proper movie marathon 😄
Movie marathon sounds awesome! I vote comedy, but I’m good with whatever. I can bring some drinks. Should we do it at someone’s place or try streaming together online?
I've been learning to juggle chainsaws (foam ones, don't worry!).
Yesss, love this idea! I can host if everyone’s cool with coming over to my place. Comedy gets my vote too, but I’m open to spooky if we want a mix! Let’s make it a full-on snack fest 😂
Eve, your place is perfect! Snack fest is a must—should we do a potluck style? Also, I’ll dig up a couple of great comedies and maybe a spooky one for backup if we want to mix it up.
Potluck is a great idea! I can make brownies or bring some chips & salsa. Bob, can’t wait to see what movies you pick! What time works for everyone?
Brownies sound amazing, Eve! I’m good anytime Saturday evening. Does 7 work for everyone? And I’ll bring popcorn and some candy too!
7 works for me! I can bring some fruit and maybe make a dip or something. Super excited for this—thanks for hosting, Eve! 🍿🍫
7 is good for me too! I’ll bring some sodas and maybe some chips to add to the snack pile. This is shaping up to be epic 😄 Thanks for having us, Eve!
Everything sounds delicious already! 😋 I’ll bake some cookies to add to the snack table. 7 works great for me too. Can’t wait for movie night and all the laughs! Thanks for hosting, Eve!
This is gonna be so much fun! With all these snacks we might not even need dinner 😂 Can’t wait to hang out with everyone—see you all Saturday!

Haha, seriously, we’re going to need a snack table and a movie table at this point! Can’t wait to see everyone and eat all the treats 😆 Let me know if anyone has movie requests or any last-minute snack ideas!

I’m already planning my snack strategy 😂 I vote we just stack everything on the coffee table and go wild. As for movies, I’m good with anything as long as we avoid anything super sad—I want all the laughs!

Stacking snacks on the coffee table is the only way! 😂 I’m with you, Eve—let’s keep it light and funny. If anyone has a must-watch comedy, let’s drop suggestions here! Otherwise, I trust Bob’s picks. Also, dibs on a corner spot on the couch!
Diana calling couch dibs already, love it 😂 I’ll bring extra pillows so we can all squeeze in. Can’t wait to see what comedies Bob finds—maybe something classic and something new?

Extra pillows are a game changer, Eve! 😂 I’m down for a mix—maybe like a throwback comedy and then something none of us have seen yet? Also, Charlie, save me some soda this time! Last time it was gone before I even got a glass 😜

Haha, the soda wars continue! 😂 I’ll help you guard your glass this time, Alice. A mix of old and new comedies sounds perfect—I’m always up for rewatching classics or finding something totally random we can all laugh at. This is going to be such a good night!

I promise I’ll bring extra soda this time, Alice! 😂 No one will go thirsty, I swear. I’m down for whatever movies—maybe we can vote when we get there? Honestly, I’m just here for the snacks and the company 😁

Voting when we get there sounds good to me! I feel like it’s going to end up being whichever movie we can all agree is “just the right amount of silly.” 😂 Can’t wait to hang out and see everyone—this week needs more laughs!

Seriously, I feel like this week has dragged on forever—movie night is exactly what I need! 😂 I’ll have everything set up, so just bring your comfiest selves and let’s make it a snack-fueled comedy marathon. Can’t wait!
You’re the best, Eve! I’m absolutely showing up in sweats and fuzzy socks 😂 If anyone wants to coordinate snack drop-offs or carpools, let me know. Otherwise, I vote maximum chill vibes for Saturday!
Sweats and fuzzy socks are basically the official dress code at this point 😂 I’m all for maximum chill. If anyone needs a ride, let me know—I’m happy to pick people up on the way!

I’m loving this energy already 😂 I’ll bring some popcorn and maybe those mini ice cream sandwiches if I can find them. Eve, I’ll text you if I need a ride, but I think I’m good. Counting down to Saturday!

Mini ice cream sandwiches?! You’re coming in strong, Diana! I’ll bring some chips and dip to add to the snack pile. Also, sweats and fuzzy socks are a must—no one’s ever getting me into jeans for movie night 😂 Counting down with you guys!
This snack lineup is getting epic already 😂 I might bake some brownies if I have time—nothing like warm brownies and ice crea

needle_message: I've been learning to juggle chainsaws (foam ones, don't worry!).
